mapper.sql: id, user_id, video_id, comment_id, action_type, action_count, last_action_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO mvp_user_action ( user_id, video_id, comment_id, action_type, action_count, last_action_time ) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.videoId}, #{item.commentId}, #{item.actionType}, #{item.actionCount}, #{item.lastActionTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE mvp_user_action SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mvp_user_action WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM mvp_user_action WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
